desc: Debug command: Export MEP tags from current view with positions and content.
summary: Debug command: Export MEP tags from current view with positions and content. Exports all IndependentTag elements that tag MEP elements to JSON. Use ImportMEPTagsFromJsonCommand to recreate the tags.
usecase: User wants to backup tag positions before model changes. User needs to transfer tags between views or models. User wants to document tag positions for analysis.
notfor: Not for autonomous AI execution. This command requires interactive Revit UI input (dialogs, picks, or manual confirmation).
precondition: Active view must be a plan, section, or 3D view with MEP tags.
postcondition: A JSON file is created containing all MEP tag data. File can be used with ImportMEPTagsFromJsonCommand.

outputs.name: ExportedFilePath
outputs.description: Path to the exported JSON file

preprompts: Exporting MEP tags from current view...
Saving tag positions and content to JSON...
thinkingsteps: Finding all tags in current view...
successprompts: Done! Your tags are saved to JSON.
